title: When moving an Date Time Item to another Board Time info missing

posts.author: melih (Melih Bas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there Question:
When I receive a mail I am able to trigger an Item and it shows me Date and Time
for an example:

Screen Shot 2020-07-07 at 22.49.151290×80 7.7 KB

But when it comes to the receipe when a status is changing move item to this etc board. Moving that Item to another Board the Time is not displaying anymore
See below:

Screen Shot 2020-07-07 at 22.51.191288×76 6.52 KB

Any Help?

posts.author: ivanhong-monday.com (ivan-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @melih!

Ivan here from the monday.com team!

Thanks so much for writing in and to confirm, when using that specific automation recipe, I’m afraid that it currently isn’t possible to carry over the timestamp for the date. The automation does not currently support the ability to maintain that timestamp, but I’ve just gone ahead and passed this valuable feedback to our Autopilot Team for their review and consideration!

posts.author: melih (Melih Bas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ivanhong-monday.com,
Thanx for your feedback, appreciate it.
